subject: feat(icons): add app icons — SVG source + Sharp generation pipeline
body:
Single SVG source (white pear on primary blue) generates all icon sizes
via Sharp at 400 DPI. PWA manifest, Apple touch icon, and favicon wired
up in app.html. Regenerate anytime with `pnpm generate-icons`.

Tags: icons, pwa, assets, config
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: app-icons
Semver: minor

title: add app icons — SVG source + Sharp generation pipeline
